subcodes.first_line: O dearly beloved friend, I have perused thy letter with the utmost care and was filled with utmost joy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوست عزیز من نامه شما را بنهایت دقت قرائت نمودم و از قسم شما نهایت بشاشت
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort, @poems and quotation from poetry
